item.title: This holiday season gon be lit
item.dc:creator: malbec

item.title: Circles on the rainbow bridge
item.description:
This was my 18 year old blind and deaf dog Nanna After 3 amazing years together she passed away in my arms this morning.
July of 2021 I brought her home as a hospice dog Nashville Humane thought she only had a few months left to live
She was a goddamn mess and even I thought she'd die within a couple weeks. I just wanted to show her all the love and all the fun she obviously missed out on the first 15 years
That whole first year together as Nanna got better and better I was still prepared for her to die any day I woke up every morning and the first thing I'd do is put my hand on her chest to see if she was still breathing
Despite the heart disease and a long list of health problems, I wanted to take Nanna everywhere Treat every fucking day like it was her last.
When Nanna got healthy and strong enough to walk, everything changed It was like the more miles she did - the happier and healthier she got She crushed a ton of 5ks and by the time she was 18 years old she was regularly doing 10ks with ease
We moved to Minnesota this year and started exploring as many bridges as we could Nanna loved the breeze on her face so much
And now Nanna crosses her final bridge without me.
When Mr Puckett died it broke me into a million fucking pieces All I could think about was how much time I wasted with him in my addiction and homelessness There was so much regret for all the days we spent apart, all the years I was blacked out instead of going on adventures with him
But I don't have a single regret with Nanna. I gave her the best 3.5 years of her entire life and as difficult as it was, I'd do the whole thing a million times over again. I gave her everything I had right up until the end.
We raised a lot of money for charities in Nanna's name over the last 3 years She was the face of fundraisers for domestic violence survivors, crisis foster organizations, humane associations and more
In Nanna's death I thought we could do one more amazing thing together to honor her life and help support other dogs looking for a 2nd lease on life So for one final time -
It would make me so happy if anyone who was able to donated 18$ in Nanna's name to the rescue I volunteer for Healing Hearts takes in dogs from all over the country and gives them a second chance to find happiness just like Nanna had.
The moment she died, surrounded by people and dogs who loved her deeply I thought about Mr Puckett standing on the other side of the rainbow bridge ready to take care of her. She's in good hands now.
Goodbye Nanna Pants, we all loved you so goddamn much. ... To donate to Healing Hearts in Nanna's name https://healingheartsrescue.org/donate/ Or https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/35V4LNUKMQJVT?ref=cm_sw_em_r_wl_dp_PMrUl9QY1uin8 ... Thank you all for loving her as much as I did.
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: This Sounds Fun
item.description: alt text: Screenshot of a post by Trammell Hudson @th@v.st: @platypus my bank used to allow custom security questions, so I set one to "what are you wearing?" and the answer to "that's very inappropriate please transfer me to your manager". the first time an customer service rep encountered it they couldn't stop laughing and had to actually transfer to a coworker to complete the call. Dec 4, 2024 at 10:32 AM
item.dc:creator: davidaugust

item.title: Anime Meme Phone Clearing Dump
item.description: The time has come for me to clear out some of the many memes I (for some reason) spent hours sorting into folders. Hope you all enjoy it. I'll post the links to the previous dumps as well for anyone who's interested. Star Wars Part 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/SVzbsKr Part 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/agPBjZY Part 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/3WbYPiO Part 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/D3xLtoh Part 5: https://imgur.com/gallery/hOagKbC Lord of the Rings https://imgur.com/gallery/YrdND58 Marvel https://imgur.com/gallery/J243dDD Harry Potter https://imgur.com/gallery/FCOoDNo Disney https://imgur.com/gallery/VFswkF4 Marvel https://imgur.com/gallery/tgBY85X Gaming Part 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/tgBY85X Part 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/dQN08Rs Part 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/uZJkc2E Part 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/zo8IFb1 P.S. I've got more gaming memes, but Imgur kept failing to post no matter what I tried, none of the files were too big, I even tried posting without any videos or gifs but it wouldn't work so if anyone has any idea what's going on there I'd appreciate the insight so I can post the rest.
item.dc:creator: GeeeButtersnaps

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1216 (sparkling gasoline)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
You guys are getting off?
The most dangerous Pokémon.
Steller's Jay in a pumpkin.
I'm so tired of this universe. This timeline. Everything is stupid. If it was possible to leave universes, I would.
Not nearly enough Dark Tower memes.
It definitely was interesting to try, but I didn't hate it.
Honestly, that's an awesome space. Needs more wall art, though.
As my friend who sent this to me said, "you identify as Arizona, don't lie."
I was thinking last night of what I'd do if I actually won an actual life-changing amount of money with a lottery. With over $80,000 of student loan debt from my ill-fated seminary experience, I'd need more than that for anything to really help with debt. I mean, I could just default on it. If we weren't looking at fascist hellscape, I'd probably stay and start a meadery. But I think now it would be escape. But I'm trapped. So it goes. I'm. I'm not sure I'm going to bother to keep working on myself anymore. Why bother?
I wish I lived in a functional country with a fully functional brain, with a less cynical soul.
If I ever raise a child who is not a bird, I will do this. I do not think this will ever happen. Especially if I really do stop working on myself.
New theory: The Doctor is a Q. The Time Lords are the Q. (I fully expect @JayDeeDubs to verbally bitchslap me in the comments why this theory is wrong and cannot be true.)
This flower, found next to the ice age mummy of a wooly rhino, was unfrozen, and sprouted. That's wild. (Well, a flower of this species depicted.)
This knife describes me.
Mood.
Pink and. Uh. If SH means "self harm," I think I'll take that one too.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [Joyous fanfare noise]
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Truth Nuggets
item.description: Richard Grosser: Ukraine: National Anthem https://youtu.be/HqB3eBlXv3M CONTENT CONTROLS “Content Controls will allow you to see fewer posts from certain topics or tags while you browse Imgur.” https://help.imgur.com/hc/en-us/articles/26509094934171-Content-Controls HOW DO I MUTE OR BLOCK AN IMGUR USER? https://help.imgur.com/hc/en-us/articles/26508943104667-How-do-I-mute-or-block-a-user# BRIAN TYLER COHEN: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT https://www.youtube.com/@briantylercohen https://bsky.app/profile/briantylercohen.bsky.social GLENN KIRSCHNER: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT (JUSTICE MATTERS) https://www.youtube.com/@GlennKirschner2 https://bsky.app/profile/glennkirschner.bsky.social MARC ELIAS: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT (DEMOCRACY DOCKET) https://www.youtube.com/c/DemocracyDocket https://bsky.app/profile/marcelias.bsky.social ANDREW TOBIAS: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT https://andrewtobias.com ROBERT REICH: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT https://www.youtube.com/@RBReich

item.dc:creator: MayMyEnemiesLiveLong

item.title: Digitool's Massive Meme Cleanse Part #219
item.description:
Gonna be honest here
I just post this today because I want the attention
I guess I just feel a bit lonely
Crashing out doesn't help either
I like that people frequently like me posting
Makes me feel special or something
Makes me feel happy and gooey
So yeah that is usually my main reason for posting
I mean, it brings some happy to some people kinda
Makes me feel appreciated
Maybe a little selfish
But it is the truth
Doesn't everyone here post for selfish reasons?
Anyway, am really fucking tired
Weather was shit today
Very persistent drizzle
The kind that is not wet but does soak you
Really sucks
I also realised I haven't seen sun in 2 weeks
I want sun
I miss sun light
December is evil
I understand why Christmas became a thing
Because you need something in this misery
So yeah, done rambling
Have fun
Hope you like
Hope it gives me some points
Might post again soon
Reading the audio book while out lately, Peter Capaldi is a good voice actor, the BBC/Netflix show completely wasted him as Kehaar, his Kehaar in the audio book is amazing Also the book is amazing
Rat tax I was teasing Violet and Rose
item.dc:creator: DigiT00l

item.title: Wholesome WEDNESDAY dump of smile pancakes
item.description:
1. Another good boy, must protect food man from vacuum invasion
2. You skied on the wrong trail mf
3. Corgy butt day
4. Buddies
5
6. Sunday be like
7. Gotta go fast
8. Just father and son goofing around
9
10. Those rabbits are richer than 99% of people reading this. Aghh, who am I kidding. Probably a 100%. Are rich people even on Imgur?
11. Playful boah
12. Mmmmm
13. Mmmm pt.2
14. May you have a great week : )
15. Thanks for scrolling all the way trough! Hope this dump made you happy! Finally I would like to share with you a little passion project of mine. Me and my brother are making a game that is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and the narrator definitely has a touch a of GladOS to him. The demo has 93% postivie rating and it the mean the world to us if you wishlisted: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
